description: Piping class A1A2: Carbon steel, ANSI Class 150, raised-face flanges, DN15–DN600. General service: water, steam, gas, hydrocarbons at moderate pressure and temperature.
material_pipe: ASTM A106 Gr. B (seamless) / ASTM A53 Gr. B (ERW, ≤ DN50 utility service)
material_fittings: ASTM A234 WPB (BW fittings), ASTM A105 (forgings), ASTM A216 WCB (castings)
boltMaterial: ASTM A193 B7 studs + A194 2H nuts
paintingSystem: Blast cleaned Sa 2.5 + 1× epoxy primer + 2× alkyd enamel
notes: Butt-weld connections for DN ≥ 50; socket-weld for DN ≤ 40 (not included here)
Spectacle blinds to be specified per line; standard blind flange per this class
Control valves, PSVs, and special items to be specified separately
